code: import React,{useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{BACKEND_URL}from'../lib/api';import{inputStyle}from'../lib/utils';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function LoginPage(_ref){let{setCurrentUser}=_ref;const[isLoginMode,setIsLoginMode]=useState(true);const[loginId,setLoginId]=useState('');const[loginPw,setLoginPw]=useState('');const[nickname,setNickname]=useState('');const navigate=useNavigate();const handleLogin=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const params=new URLSearchParams();params.append('username',loginId);params.append('password',loginPw);const response=await axios.post(`${BACKEND_URL}/login`,params);const userData={username:response.data.username,nickname:response.data.nickname,level:response.data.level,is_admin:response.data.is_admin,access_token:response.data.access_token};localStorage.setItem('announcer_user',JSON.stringify(userData));setCurrentUser(userData);alert(`${response.data.nickname}님, 환영합니다!`);navigate('/');}catch(error){alert("로그인 실패: 아이디와 비밀번호를 확인해주세요.");}};const handleSignup=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{await axios.post(`${BACKEND_URL}/signup`,{username:loginId,nickname,password:loginPw});alert(`${nickname}님, 가입 완료! 이제 로그인해주세요.`);setNickname('');setLoginPw('');setIsLoginMode(true);}catch(error){alert("가입 실패: 이미 존재하는 아이디입니다.");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"max-w-md mx-auto bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 mt-10",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-2xl font-bold text-center mb-6 text-gray-800",children:isLoginMode?'다시 오셨군요! 👋':'새 스터디원 가입 🎉'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:isLoginMode?handleLogin:handleSignup,className:"space-y-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1",children:"\uC544\uC774\uB514"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:loginId,onChange:e=>setLoginId(e.target.value),required:true,className:inputStyle})]}),!isLoginMode&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1",children:"\uC0AC\uC6A9\uD560 \uB2C9\uB124\uC784"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:nickname,onChange:e=>setNickname(e.target.value),required:true,className:inputStyle})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-1",children:"\uBE44\uBC00\uBC88\uD638"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",value:loginPw,onChange:e=>setLoginPw(e.target.value),required:true,className:inputStyle})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:`w-full py-3.5 rounded-lg font-bold text-white text-lg transition-colors shadow-md mt-4 ${isLoginMode?'bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700':'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'}`,children:isLoginMode?'로그인':'회원가입 완료'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setIsLoginMode(!isLoginMode),className:"w-full mt-6 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-blue-600 underline",children:isLoginMode?'아직 계정이 없으신가요? 10초만에 회원가입':'이미 계정이 있으신가요? 로그인하러 가기'})]});}export default LoginPage;
